---
title: "05 Model Validation"
author: "Alexandra Tejada-Strop"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This script evaluates model performance using 5 fold cross validation.

It compares a logistic regression model and a random forest model for predicting postpartum depressive symptoms using prenatal screening status and selected covariates.

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(here)
library(ranger)
```

```{r}
data_path <- here("data", "processed-data", "prams_analytic.rds")
stopifnot(file.exists(data_path))

analytic_dat <- readRDS(data_path)

required_vars <- c("pp_depress_bin", "screened", "bpg_deprs8", "mat_ed")
stopifnot(all(required_vars %in% names(analytic_dat)))

analytic_dat <- analytic_dat |>
  mutate(
    pp_depress_bin = factor(pp_depress_bin, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes")),
    screened = factor(screened),
    bpg_deprs8 = factor(bpg_deprs8),
    mat_ed = factor(mat_ed)
  ) |>
  drop_na(pp_depress_bin, screened, bpg_deprs8, mat_ed)

glimpse(analytic_dat)
```

# Cross Validation
```{r}
set.seed(123)

folds <- vfold_cv(analytic_dat, v = 5, strata = pp_depress_bin)

folds
```

# Logistic regression model
```{r}
my_metrics <- metric_set(
  accuracy,
  metric_tweak("roc_auc", roc_auc, event_level = "second")
)

log_spec <- logistic_reg() |>
  set_engine("glm")

log_recipe <- recipe(pp_depress_bin ~ screened + bpg_deprs8 + mat_ed, data = analytic_dat)

log_workflow <- workflow() |>
  add_model(log_spec) |>
  add_recipe(log_recipe)

log_res <- fit_resamples(
  log_workflow,
  resamples = folds,
  metrics = my_metrics,
  control = control_resamples(save_pred = TRUE)
)

log_metrics <- collect_metrics(log_res) |>
  mutate(model = "Logistic regression")

log_metrics
```

# Random forest model
```{r}
rf_spec <- rand_forest(trees = 300, mode = "classification") |>
  set_engine("ranger")

rf_recipe <- recipe(pp_depress_bin ~ screened + bpg_deprs8 + mat_ed, data = analytic_dat)

rf_workflow <- workflow() |>
  add_model(rf_spec) |>
  add_recipe(rf_recipe)

rf_res <- fit_resamples(
  rf_workflow,
  resamples = folds,
  metrics = my_metrics,
  control = control_resamples(save_pred = TRUE)
)

rf_metrics <- collect_metrics(rf_res) |>
  mutate(model = "Random forest")

rf_metrics
```


# Compare models
```{r}
model_compare <- bind_rows(log_metrics, rf_metrics) |>
  select(model, .metric, mean, std_err, n) |>
  arrange(.metric, desc(mean))

model_compare

dir.create(here("results", "tables"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(here("results", "output"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

write_csv(model_compare, here("results", "tables", "model_comparison.csv"))
saveRDS(model_compare, here("results", "tables", "model_comparison.rds"))
saveRDS(log_res, here("results", "output", "logistic_cv_results.rds"))
saveRDS(rf_res, here("results", "output", "random_forest_cv_results.rds"))

file.exists(here("results", "tables", "model_comparison.csv"))
file.exists(here("results", "tables", "model_comparison.rds"))
file.exists(here("results", "output", "logistic_cv_results.rds"))
file.exists(here("results", "output", "random_forest_cv_results.rds"))
```
